reviews.review_description: This seems like someone started working on it and then gave up not even half way through. Very poorly designed and glitchy, with very limited views and prerecorded images, sometimes far too small to even appreciate what's going on. As an ultrasound educator, this isn't even a beta and shouldn't be for sale. Would like my money back.

developer_response.body:
Dear LuvDoc,

We appreciate your feedback, please get in touch to understand what issues did you experience as our community is confident that this tools adds lots of value for Ultrasound education.
